name: xf_cep_not_chain_heaptie
drl: rule NT when $a : E0() $b : E1(this after[0ms,150ms] $a) not E2(this after[0ms,100ms] $b) then end
comment: D-134 (§3B) FENCED within-close-time HEAP TIE: chain_not with two tuples sharing a not-anchor (same close-time). Drools' order is a PriorityQueue binary-heap artifact (DefaultTimerJobInstance.compareTo, no secondary key) — internally INCONSISTENT here (3-then-4 for one tie, 4-then-3 for another), so NO deterministic rule reproduces it; the validated model diverges too. FIRING SET 0-div; order-only. Not gated (§6). See DECISIONS D-134 / model_not_infer.py.
